title: tium terminale
intro: Tium terminale, also known as Picrorhiza or Kutki, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the gentian family. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as improving digestion, reducing stress and anxiety, and enhancing cognitive function. Tium terminale can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including liver and digestive problems.
